preferences.currencyDescription: Currency controls displayed pricing and checkout currency. Your choice is saved for next time.

auth.metadataTitle: Log In or Create Account | SimchaCam
auth.metadataDescription: Log in or create a SimchaCam account to host private family-event livestreams.
auth.signupDescription: Create and share private livestreams for your family simchas.
auth.loginDescription: Sign in to manage your events and start livestreaming.
auth.oauthFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.signupSuccess: Check your email and confirm your account before logging in to SimchaCam. If you do not see the email, check your spam or junk folder.
auth.signupFootnote: You will need to confirm your email before creating or managing events.
auth.loginFootnote: Only confirmed accounts can access protected SimchaCam features.

errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before logging in. Check your inbox for the confirmation link, including your spam or junk folder.
errors.invalidCredentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account already exists for this email address. Please log in instead.
errors.weakPassword: Please choose a stronger password with at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: Could not complete authentication. Please try again.

support.metadataDescription: Contact SimchaCam support for help, questions, feedback, or livestream issues.
support.title: Need help?
support.description: For support, questions, feedback, or issues with a livestream, please contact us at:
support.responseTime: We aim to respond within 24 hours.

forgotPassword.metadataDescription: Request a secure password reset email for your SimchaCam account.
forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a secure link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email address, Supabase will send a password reset link. Please check your inbox and spam or junk folder.
forgotPassword.error: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.

resetPassword.metadataDescription: Set a new password for your SimchaCam account using a secure recovery link.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your SimchaCam account.
resetPassword.invalidLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.minimumLength: Please choose a password with at least 6 characters.
resetPassword.updateFailed: Could not update your password. Please try again.

accountSettings.metadataDescription: Manage your SimchaCam account settings and update your password securely.
accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.description: Update your password securely while staying signed in to your SimchaCam account.
accountSettings.changeDescription: Choose a new password for future logins.

editEvent.metadataDescription: Update a SimchaCam event name, password, scheduling details, and Premium settings.
editEvent.invalidDate: Please enter a valid event date and time
editEvent.title: Edit Event
editEvent.description: Update the event name or change how invited viewers access this private event.
editEvent.scheduleDescription: Set when this Premium livestream is scheduled to take place.
editEvent.premiumDescription: Upgrade this event to Premium to unlock event scheduling, recording, replay and download.
editEvent.premiumFootnote: Premium features are enabled after upgrading this specific event.
editEvent.passwordDescription: Enter a new password to replace the current one. Leave this field untouched to keep the existing password.
editEvent.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
editEvent.recordingEnabled: Premium recording is enabled for this event.
editEvent.recordingDisabled: Premium recording is not enabled for this event.

hero.title: Bring everyone closer to the celebration.
hero.description: Private, simple livestreaming for weddings, bar mitzvahs, brit milahs and family simchas. Share one secure link so relatives can watch from anywhere.

createEvent.title: Create Event
createEvent.description: Set up a private livestream page for your simcha. You can share the event link as soon as it is created.
createEvent.privacyDescription: Add an optional password so only invited family and friends can enter the livestream and access its recording.
createEvent.freeDescription: Create a private event link and stream for up to 45 minutes. Perfect for a quick family moment or small simcha.
createEvent.premiumTitle: More time, more guests, and a lasting replay
createEvent.premiumDescription: For bigger simchas, longer streams, more guests, automatic recording, replay and download.
createEvent.upgradeHelper: Creates your event first, then takes you securely to checkout.

alerts.confirmEmail: Please confirm your email before creating an event
alerts.loginRequired: Please log in before creating an event

eventCreated.title: Your event is ready
eventCreated.premiumDescription: Add automatic recording, replay for 30 days, download access, and a longer Premium livestream for this event.
eventCreated.upgradeAgain: Your event is still saved as a Free event. You can try upgrading again here.
eventCreated.readyDescription: Start the livestream when the celebration begins. You can also return and start it later from My Events.

alerts.checkoutLogin: Please log in before upgrading to Premium
alerts.goLiveLogin: Please log in before starting a livestream

myEvents.title: My Events
myEvents.description: Manage your upcoming livestreams, share private event links, and return to past recordings.
myEvents.emptyDescription: Create an event, share its private link, and go live when the celebration begins.
myEvents.dateMissingPremium: Click Edit Event to add time and date

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.description: Scheduled events ready to share and stream

nominationDialog.title: Nominate a streamer
nominationDialog.description: Invite someone you trust to go live for this Premium event. They must sign up or log in with the same email address.

messages.endedFree: This free livestream has ended. No recording is available.
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{eventName}"?
messages.goLiveLogin: Please log in before starting a livestream
messages.nominatedStreamerInfo: You have been nominated to stream this event. You can go live and share the viewer link, but only the event owner can edit settings.
messages.nominationPrompt: Enter the streamer's email address. They must sign up or log in with this same email.
messages.nominationEmailRequired: Please enter the streamer's email address.
messages.nominationLogin: Please log in before nominating a streamer.

viewer.loadFailed: We couldn't load this event. Please check your connection and try again.
viewer.passwordDescription: This livestream is private. Enter the password shared by the host to continue.
viewer.recordingProcessingDescription: The replay is being prepared. This page will update automatically when it is ready.
viewer.recordingFailedDescription: Unfortunately, a replay is not available for this event.
viewer.recordingPrivacy: Please share this private recording only with invited family and friends.
viewer.noRecording: No recording is currently available for this event.
viewer.waitingDescription: The livestream has not started yet. It will begin automatically on this page when the host goes live.
viewer.readyToWatch: The livestream is ready to watch.
viewer.watchLiveDescription: Tap Watch Live to start the private stream with sound.
viewer.hostNotPresent: The host is not connected yet. This page will keep trying automatically.
viewer.eventFull: This livestream is currently full. Please try again shortly.
viewer.audioStartFailed: Sound did not start. Tap Watch Live again, and check your device volume or silent mode.

streamer.recordingSignInWarning: Recording could not start because you are not signed in.
streamer.recordingResumeWarning: Recording could not resume. Please end and restart if this continues.
streamer.recordingConnectionWarning: Recording could not resume. Please check your connection.
streamer.leaveWarning: Your Premium livestream is still active. Leaving may interrupt recording.
streamer.endLoginRequired: Please log in before ending the livestream

preLiveSetup.title: Ready to go live?
preLiveSetup.description: Turn your phone sideways, frame your shot, then start.
guidance: Keep the phone plugged in if possible.
Use strong Wi-Fi or reliable mobile data.
preLiveSetup.previewError: Could not start the camera preview. Check camera and microphone permissions, then try Start Livestream.

howItWorks.title: A private livestream in four simple steps.
howItWorks.description: SimchaCam is designed for families: create the event, share one private link, and go live from your phone.

steps.title: Create a private event
steps.body: Set up a livestream page in moments, with an optional password.

steps.title: Share the link
steps.body: Send the private event link by WhatsApp, email, or message.

steps.title: Go live from your phone
steps.body: Start the livestream when the celebration begins. No app required.

steps.title: Family watches anywhere
steps.body: Loved ones can join securely from wherever they are.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade only if you need more.
pricing.description: Every event starts with a private livestream link. Premium is a one-off upgrade for a specific event.

free.label: Free
free.title: Private livestream
free.description: Perfect for a simple, private family livestream.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: For longer events, more guests, and a family replay.

why.title: Built for relatives near and far.
why.description: Unlike a general Zoom call or a busy WhatsApp group, SimchaCam is built for family simchas. Share one private link, add a password if needed, and let guests watch in their browser without installing an app.

recording.title: Keep the moment available after the livestream.
recording.description: Premium events are automatically recorded, then made available for replay and download for 30 days.
recording.cardTitle: Replay for family, download for keeps.
recording.cardBody: Ideal for relatives in different time zones, family who cannot attend live, or anyone who wants to watch the simcha again.

finalCta.title: Create the event free. Upgrade only if you need Premium.
finalCta.description: Start with a private link today, then add scheduling, recording, replay and download when the event needs it.
